intent.title: Create TheHive case for suspicious IP
intent.description: User asked to open a case in TheHive for IP 1.2.3.4 with severity high.
intent.user_prompt: Open a TheHive case for 1.2.3.4, severity high

parameters.title: Suspicious IP 1.2.3.4 — analyst review
parameters.description: IP flagged by user for enrichment and investigation.

risk.estimated_impact: Creates a new investigation case; no infra impact

llm_explanation.reasoning_summary: User wants a TheHive case for an IP. I will create a case with severity 3 and attach the IP as an observable.
alternatives_considered: Only log to MISP without creating a TheHive case
